# The Style Workshop
> Beautifully Considered Spaces

The Style Workshop is a boutique residential interior design studio founded and directed by Emily Webster. Based in Mosman on Sydney's Lower North Shore, the studio has been creating considered, liveable interiors since 2009 across Sydney's Lower North Shore, Northern Beaches, Eastern Suburbs, Inner West, and rural New South Wales.

## About Emily Webster
Emily Webster is the principal interior designer and founder of The Style Workshop. With 17+ years of experience and 80+ projects completed, she specialises in considered residential interiors — from curated room refreshes to full renovations. Emily works across Sydney's most sought-after neighbourhoods including Mosman, Cremorne, Neutral Bay, Woollahra, Paddington, Double Bay, Balmain, and the Northern Beaches.

## Services
- **The Initial Consultation** — $695 incl. GST. A 90-minute in-home consultation covering layout and spatial planning advice, open Q&A, and written recommendations with visual reference delivered within 3 business days.
- **The Room Edit** — $1,950 incl. GST. Complete design concept for one room including colour palette, material selections, and curated shopping edit.
- **The Design Edit** — $2,800 incl. GST. Fully resolved interior design service for one room including finishes schedule, lighting selections, and trade pricing.
- **The Signature Styling Experience** — $4,950 incl. GST. Immersive full-service package with access to trade-only showrooms and exclusive one-of-a-kind pieces.

Add-on services (Finishing Layer, Furniture Selection, Sourcing, Artwork, Lighting, Additional Rooms) are available and quoted per project.

Design hourly rate: $275/hr incl. GST. Procurement margin: 15% on trades/items, always disclosed upfront.

## Process
1. Discovery Call — complimentary call to discuss brief, timeline and budget.
2. On-Site Consultation — in-home visit to understand your space, style and aspirations.
3. Design Proposal — detailed fee proposal tailored to your project scope.
4. Design & Delivery — full management of concept through to final styling.
